_comment: Pages watched monthly by scripts/watch_sources.py. A change opens/updates a report for a maintainer to TRIAGE (it may be a new/amended instrument OR a cosmetic page update). Nothing is ingested automatically. Add ISA Council/LTC pages as the Mining Code advances (Phase 1, front-loaded watch).
